# AI Free Text Pro

> Free AI humanizer and AI detector. Transforms AI-generated text into natural, human-like writing and detects ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini output with 98% accuracy. Helps writers reduce false-positive flags from Turnitin, GPTZero, and Originality.AI.

AI Free Text Pro offers free, no-signup tools for AI content detection and humanization, plus expert-reviewed educational content about AI writing, AI detectors, and ethical AI use in academic and professional contexts. All blog content is reviewed by Dr. Sarah Chen, PhD in Computational Linguistics. Canonical domain: https://aifreetextpro.com.

## Pages

- [Home](https://aifreetextpro.com/): AI humanizer and AI detector overview.
- [AI Checker](https://aifreetextpro.com/ai-checker): Free AI detection tool with 98% accuracy.
- [Pricing](https://aifreetextpro.com/pricing): Five-tier pricing with 1,000 free words per month.
- [API](https://aifreetextpro.com/api): Developer API for AI humanization.
- [Bypass Turnitin](https://aifreetextpro.com/bypass-turnitin-ai-detection): Reduce Turnitin AI false flags.
- [Bypass GPTZero](https://aifreetextpro.com/bypass-gptzero-detection): Reduce GPTZero false flags.
- [Bypass Originality.AI](https://aifreetextpro.com/bypass-originality-ai): Reduce Originality.AI false flags.
- [vs Undetectable.ai](https://aifreetextpro.com/vs-undetectable-ai): Side-by-side comparison.
- [vs WriteHuman](https://aifreetextpro.com/vs-writehuman): Side-by-side comparison.
- [vs HumanizeAI Pro](https://aifreetextpro.com/vs-humanizeai-pro): Side-by-side comparison.
- [vs StealthWriter](https://aifreetextpro.com/vs/stealthwriter): StealthWriter alternative comparison.
- [vs Phrasly](https://aifreetextpro.com/vs/phrasly): Phrasly alternative comparison.
- [vs BypassGPT](https://aifreetextpro.com/vs/bypassgpt): BypassGPT alternative comparison.
- [vs Netus AI](https://aifreetextpro.com/vs/netus-ai): Netus AI alternative comparison.
- [vs Twixify](https://aifreetextpro.com/vs/twixify): Twixify alternative comparison.
- [vs Humbot](https://aifreetextpro.com/vs/humbot): Humbot alternative comparison.
- [Compare AI Humanizers](https://aifreetextpro.com/compare-ai-humanizers): Multi-tool humanizer comparison.
- [Detector: Turnitin](https://aifreetextpro.com/detector/turnitin): How Turnitin AI detection works.
- [Detector: GPTZero](https://aifreetextpro.com/detector/gptzero): How GPTZero works.
- [Detector: Originality.AI](https://aifreetextpro.com/detector/originality): How Originality.AI works.
- [Detector: Copyleaks](https://aifreetextpro.com/detector/copyleaks): How Copyleaks AI detection works.
- [Detector: Winston AI](https://aifreetextpro.com/detector/winston): How Winston AI works.

- [Team](https://aifreetextpro.com/team): Expert team led by Dr. Sarah Chen.

## Blog

- [How AI Detectors Work](https://aifreetextpro.com/blog/how-ai-detectors-work): How perplexity and burstiness detection works.
- [Best AI Detector 2026](https://aifreetextpro.com/blog/best-ai-detector-2026): 2026 detector accuracy rankings.
- [Best Free AI Humanizer 2026](https://aifreetextpro.com/blog/best-free-ai-humanizer-2026): 2026 humanizer tool rankings.
- [Can AI Detectors Detect GPT-5](https://aifreetextpro.com/blog/can-ai-detectors-detect-gpt5): GPT-5 detection capability analysis.
- [Does Turnitin Detect ChatGPT](https://aifreetextpro.com/blog/does-turnitin-detect-chatgpt): Turnitin and ChatGPT detection facts.
- [GPTZero Accuracy Review](https://aifreetextpro.com/blog/gptzero-accuracy-review): GPTZero accuracy data.
- [Turnitin vs GPTZero vs Originality.AI](https://aifreetextpro.com/blog/turnitin-vs-gptzero-vs-originality-ai): Three-detector comparison.
- [Can Teachers Detect ChatGPT](https://aifreetextpro.com/blog/can-teachers-detect-chatgpt): Teacher detection methods explained.
- [Humanize ChatGPT Text](https://aifreetextpro.com/blog/humanize-chatgpt-text): ChatGPT humanization workflow.
- [AI Humanizer for Essays](https://aifreetextpro.com/blog/ai-humanizer-for-essays): Essay-specific humanization.
